{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "tomasilluminati", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/147225560?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tomasilluminati/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tomasilluminati/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tomasilluminati/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tomasilluminati/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/tomasilluminati", "id": 147225560, "login": "tomasilluminati", "node_id": "U_kgDOCMZ72A", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tomasilluminati/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tomasilluminati/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tomasilluminati/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tomasilluminati/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tomasilluminati/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/tomasilluminati", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49401", "cvss": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-41", "CWE-176"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-41", "name": "Improper Resolution of Path Equivalence"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-176", "name": "Improper Handling of Unicode Encoding"}], "description": "## Summary

Deno's permission system enforces filesystem and execution restrictions by
comparing the requested path against the path supplied to `--deny-read`,
`--deny-write`, `--deny-run`, or `--deny-ffi`. On macOS, that comparison was
done at the raw-byte level while the APFS filesystem treats different Unicode
spellings of the same name as the same file.

That means a program could reach a denied path by spelling it differently than
the deny rule. For example, with `--deny-read=/secrets/passwörter.txt`, a
script could still read the file by opening `/secrets/passwo\u0308rter.txt`
(NFD instead of NFC), or `/SECRETS/PASSWÖRTER.txt` (different case, since
default APFS volumes are case-insensitive). Other forms include ligature
characters (`ﬁ` vs `fi`, `ﬀ` vs `ff`, …) and German `ß` vs `ss`.

The denied path and the requested path differed at the byte level, so Deno's
permission check passed; the kernel then resolved them to the same inode and
served the file anyway. The same flaw affected `--deny-write`, `--deny-run`,
and `--deny-ffi`, which share the same path-comparison code.

## Am I affected?

You are potentially affected if **all** of the following are true:

1. You run Deno on **macOS** (the issue is specific to APFS path-equivalence
   rules; Linux and Windows are not affected by this variant).
2. You rely on `--deny-read`, `--deny-write`, `--deny-run`, or `--deny-ffi`
   as a security boundary against less-trusted code — a dependency, plugin,
   or attacker-controlled input.
3. The protected path contains characters that have alternate Unicode
   spellings — most commonly accented characters (`é`, `ñ`, `ö`, …), German
   `ß`, or Latin ligatures — or you rely on case-sensitivity on a default
   APFS volume.

If you only run fully trusted code, or your deny rules cover paths that are
pure ASCII with no case-sensitive aliases, you are not exposed to this
specific bypass.

## Impact

A program running with broad `--allow-read` (or `--allow-write` /
`--allow-run` / `--allow-ffi`) but with `--deny-*` carve-outs for specific
paths could read, write, execute, or load via FFI those denied paths by
referring to them through a Unicode- or case-equivalent spelling. The sandbox
model on macOS was weaker than the flags suggested.

## Workaround

If you cannot upgrade immediately:

- Prefer `--allow-*` allowlists over `--deny-*` denylists. Allow rules match
   against the original specifier, so an attacker-supplied alternate spelling
   will not match a path you didn't explicitly grant.
- Do not rely on case-sensitivity of paths on macOS for security boundaries;
   default APFS volumes are case-insensitive.

## Fix

On macOS, Deno now normalizes both the deny-rule path and the requested path
to NFC and applies Unicode case folding before comparing them. This matches
how APFS resolves paths at the inode level, so byte-different but equivalent
spellings are now rejected by the same deny rule.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8xpq-cjcf-3wh9", "html_url": "https://github.com/denoland/deno/security/advisories/GHSA-8xpq-cjcf-3wh9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8xpq-cjcf-3wh9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49401"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-27T13:14:18Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/13602871?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bartlomieju/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bartlomieju/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bartlomieju/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bartlomieju/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bartlomieju", "id": 13602871, "login": "bartlomieju", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjEzNjAyODcx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bartlomieju/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bartlomieju/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bartlomieju/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bartlomieju/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bartlomieju/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bartlomieju", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "high", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Deno Permission Bypass via Unicode Normalization Mismatch on macOS (APFS)", "updated_at": "2026-05-30T03:04:18Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/denoland/deno/security-advisories/GHSA-8xpq-cjcf-3wh9", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "deno"}, "patched_versions": "2.7.14", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.7.13"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Deno Permission Bypass via Unicode Normalization Mismatch on macOS (APFS)
